message.content:
@startuml
title Mengubah SubMenu

actor "Administrator" as Administrator
interface "Dashboard_V" as Dashboard_V
interface "Submenu_V" as Submenu_V
interface "EditSubmenu_V" as EditSubmenu_V
interface "Admin_C" as Admin_C
interface "Menu_C" as Menu_C
interface "Submenu_E" as Submenu_E

Administrator --> Dashboard_V : 2 Halaman Dashboard
Dashboard_V --> Administrator : 1 load->view()
Administrator --> Dashboard_V : 3 klik menu Submenu management
Dashboard_V --> Menu_C : 4 Submenu()
Menu_C --> Submenu_E : 5
Submenu_E --> Menu_C : 6
Menu_C --> Submenu_V : 7 load->view()
Submenu_V --> Administrator : 8 Halaman Submenu management
Administrator --> Submenu_V : 9 klik tombol EditSubmenu
Submenu_V --> Menu_C : 10 EditSubmenu()
Menu_C --> EditSubmenu_V : 11 load->view()
EditSubmenu_V --> Administrator : 12 Halaman EditSubmenu
Administrator --> EditSubmenu_V : 13 Mengisi Inputan dan klik tombol edit
note right of Administrator : Inputan Submenu
EditSubmenu_V --> Menu_C : 14 EditSubmenu()
Menu_C --> Submenu_E : 15

alt [isValid() case]
  Menu_C --> Submenu_E : 16 isValid()
  Submenu_E --> Menu_C : 17 load->view()
  Menu_C --> Administrator : 18 Halaman Submenu
else [isInvalid() case]
  Menu_C --> Submenu_E : 19 isInvalid()
  Submenu_E --> EditSubmenu_V : 20 load->view()
  EditSubmenu_V --> Administrator : 21 Halaman Edit Submenu
end

@enduml
